rationale: No direct conflict. Section 29.008(b) defines local tax effort as total tax revenue generated; the formula self-adjusts to changes in taxable values caused by the homestead exemption increase. No statutory amendment to this section is required.
quote: For purposes of this subsection, "local tax effort" means the total amount of money generated by taxes imposed for debt service and maintenance and operation less any amounts paid into a tax increment fund under Chapter 311, Tax Code.
_note: Indirect fiscal impact possible via reduced local tax effort affecting local/state share calculations under Subsection (b), but no direct statutory conflict exists.
